query:
SELECT 
  c.name,
  c.isin,
  c.sector,
  c.geography,
  scr."expectedAnnualLoss",
  scr."topSuppliers"
FROM companies c
LEFT JOIN "supplyChainRisks" scr ON c.id = scr."companyId"
WHERE c.isin = 'US1270971039';
